title: stevia plummerae
intro: Stevia plummerae, also known as Sweetroot or Mountain Mallow, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, offering several health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stevia plummerae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
